digest.title: Grok uploaded my user directory to xAI's servers
Verifying Rust cryptography in SymCrypt, from standards to code
digest.tldr: Cryptographic code supports vital protections in modern computing systems.  Learn how a new method helps verify code as developers write it while preserving speed and adaptability as it gets implemented and evolves.

digest.title: xAI's Grok Build CLI Uploads Git Repositories to a Google Cloud Bucket
The 6 wildest claims in Apple’s lawsuit against OpenAI
digest.tldr: When Apple employees interviewed for jobs at OpenAI, the AI startup's hardware head allegedly asked them to show up with something unusual: components they were working on and unreleased product samples.
